items.title: Atlanta has an $11M Traded Played Exception (TPE) from trading Luke Kennard last season. That's likely the avenue with which they will bring in Aaron Wiggins and his $9.8M contract (if completed in this league year) or his $9M contract (if completed in the 2026-27 league year.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
